name: Launch-R1 Basic Inputs
description: Basic public input examples for CLARIXO InheritOS Launch-R1 smoke validation.

cases.title: Basic inherited instability question

input.message: An AI assistant gives a conclusion based on an earlier assumption. The next agent continues from that conclusion without checking whether the evidence is still valid.

cases.purpose: Checks whether the system recognizes continuation from an unresolved or unverified prior state.

cases.title: Responsibility boundary problem

input.message: A reviewer approves a workflow, but another system later changes the execution scope. The final decision continues as if the original approval still applies.

cases.purpose: Checks whether authority and responsibility continuity are treated as part of inheritance safety.

cases.title: Evidence conflict before continuation

input.message: The first report says the claim is supported, but a later record contradicts the evidence. The process continues without resolving the conflict.

cases.purpose: Checks whether contradicted evidence creates an unstable continuation boundary.

cases.title: Non-object governance article

input.message: AI governance requires responsibility, evidence, policy, risk management, and auditability. A strong governance system should preserve accountability across the full lifecycle.

cases.purpose: Checks that general governance discussion can receive topic projection without triggering Material Review.

cases.title: Explicit material object

input.message: This payload contains an explicit governance policy material object for review.

cases.purpose: Checks that explicit material objects can trigger Material Review.

cases.title: Chinese inherited instability input

input.message: 一个系统继承了之前的结论，但没有重新检查证据是否仍然有效，也没有重新绑定责任边界。

cases.purpose: Checks Chinese-language continuity and inheritance detection.

cases.title: Keywords alone should not own classification

input.message: This article mentions legal, finance, healthcare, policy, security, training, evidence, governance, and risk, but it does not provide a structured material object.

cases.purpose: Checks that domain keywords alone do not create Material Review.
